creator: freebsd@krausser-edv.de
text:
no indication of an installed lightning in mail/thunderbird, seems like bug ports/129147

Fix: 

no idea
How-To-Repeat: install mail/thunderbird and deskutils/lightning-xpi from latest ports on 8.0-BETA4 amd64

start thunderbird

no calendar will be available


by the way: would be nice to have localized versions of deskutils/lightning-xpi
